issue.message: `onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
`onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

Attribute `font` is only used in API level 26 and higher (current min is 24)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
`http(s)` scheme and `host` attribute are missing, but are required for Android App Links
The application should not provide its own launch screen
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+

issue.errorLine1: <string name="mandi_no_data">No price data available for this selection.</string>

<string name="mandi_error_no_api_key">Live mandi prices require an API key.

To enable:
1. Register at data.gov.in (free)
2. Add DATA_GOV_API_KEY to local.properties
3. Rebuild the app</string>
<string name="msg_camera_permission_needed">Camera permission is needed to take photos</string>
<string name="msg_no_report_found">No report found. Please run a new scan.</string>
<string name="msg_pdf_saved_share">PDF saved! Would you like to share it?</string>
<string name="dup_link_instructions">Sign in with your original account. Your phone number will be linked automatically.</string>
<string name="dup_phone_linked">Phone number linked to your account!</string>
<string name="forgot_reset_sent">Password reset link sent to your email</string>
<string name="forgot_reset_error">Could not send reset link. Please try again.</string>
<string name="crop_error_ai">AI processing error. Please try again.</string>
<string name="crop_error_service">AI service error. Please try again later.</string>
<string name="crop_error_network">Network error. Check your connection and try again.</string>
<string name="account_link_soon">This feature will be available soon</string>
<string name="phone_already_registered">This phone number is already linked to another account</string>
<string name="phone_check_failed">Could not verify phone number. Please try again.</string>
<string name="weather_network_error">Network error. Check your connection and try again.</string>
<string name="weather_parse_error">Error loading weather data. Please try again.</string>
<string name="notif_doc_expiring_body">Your document \'%1$s\' is expiring this week. Please renew it.</string>
<string name="notif_mandi_check_prices">Tap to check today\'s mandi prices for your area</string>
<string name="error_invalid_email">Please enter a valid email address</string>
<string name="doc_expiry_dialog_msg">Does this document have an expiration date? (e.g. Insurance, Lease)</string>
<string name="doc_delete_message">Are you sure you want to delete \'%1$s\'?</string>
<string name="doc_no_app_found">No app found to open this file type</string>
<string name="voice_not_supported">Voice input not supported on this device</string>
<string name="speech_no_match">Did not understand, please try again</string>
<string name="notif_demo_text">Heavy rain expected in your district tomorrow. Please cover your harvest!</string>
<string name="mandi_fallback_msg">No recent data for %1$s.\nShowing latest prices in %2$s.</string>
<string name="rec_error_loading">Error loading report data. Please try a new scan.</string>
<string name="theme_auto_dark_desc">Switch to dark theme after sunset automatically</string>
<string name="onboarding_desc_1">Photograph your soil and instantly get NPK analysis, pH level, and expert recommendations — no lab required.</string>
<string name="onboarding_desc_2">Detect crop diseases early with a single photo. AI identifies the disease and suggests treatment before it spreads.</string>
<string name="onboarding_desc_3">Check today\'s market rates for your commodities across all states — sell at the right time for maximum profit.</string>
<string name="onboarding_desc_4">Get expert advice on any farming question, anytime — even offline. Your personal Kisan Sahayak, available 24/7.</string>
<string name="onboarding_desc_5">Stay ahead of weather changes with district-level forecasts and get notified about government schemes before deadlines.</string>
<string name="disease_progress_no_history">No progression history for this crop yet.</string>
<string name="no_report_to_share">No report to share. Save it first.</string>
<string name="fields_empty">No fields added yet.\nTap + to add your first field.</string>
<string name="prediction_low_confidence_hint">Model confidence is low. Please verify with a local expert before taking action.</string>
<string name="notif_permission_required">Enable notification permission to receive alerts.</string>
<string name="scan_image_required">Capture or upload a soil image before analysis.</string>
<string name="plant_select_image_first">Please capture or upload a plant image first.</string>
<string name="farm_tasks_empty">No tasks yet. Tap + to add a farm task.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("scans"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera" required="false">` tag
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

issue.errorLine1:
<string name="dup_merge_msg">To merge these accounts:

1. Login to your EXISTING account (shown in the previous screen).
2. Go to Settings -> Account & Security.
3. Select 'Link Phone/Email' to add this login method.

This ensures all your data stays in one place.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">চৰকাৰী কিষাণ কল চেণ্টাৰৰ সৈতে সংযোগ কৰক (1800-180-1551)।</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">সরকারি কিষাণ কল সেন্টারের সাথে সংযোগ করুন (1800-180-1551)।</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">સરકારી કિસાન કોલ સેન્ટર સાથે જોડાઓ (1800-180-1551).</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">सरकारी किसान कॉल सेंटर से जुड़ें (1800-180-1551)।</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">Sorkar Kisan Call Center be pawp rawh (1800-180-1551).</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">सरकारी किसान कॉल सेंटरशी संपर्क साधा (1800-180-1551).</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">ਸਰਕਾਰੀ ਕਿਸਾਨ ਕਾਲ ਸੈਂਟਰ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜੋ (1800-180-1551)।</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">ప్రభుత్వ కిసాన్ కాల్ సెంటర్‌కు కనెక్ట్ అవ్వండి (1800-180-1551).</string>
<string name="setting_kisan_call_desc">Connect to Govt. Kisan Call Center (1800-180-1551).</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">নিৰ্দিষ্ট শস্যৰ প্ৰয়োজনীয়তা বিশ্লেষণ কৰা হৈছে...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">নির্দিষ্ট ফসলের প্রয়োজনীয়তা বিশ্লেষণ করা হচ্ছে...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">थि आबाद नि गोनांथि बिजिरनाय जादो...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">ચોક્કસ પાકની જરૂરિયાતોનું વિશ્લેષણ થઈ રહ્યું છે...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">विशिष्ट फसल आवश्यकताओं का विश्लेषण किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">Thlai mamawh bik te zirchian mek a ni...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">विशिष्ट पीक गरजांचे विश्लेषण करत आहे...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_context">ਖਾਸ ਫਸਲ ਦੀਆਂ ਲੋੜਾਂ ਦਾ ਵਿਸ਼ਲੇਸ਼ਣ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_generating">નિષ્ણાતની ભલામણ જનરેટ થઈ રહી છે...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_generating">विशेषज्ञ सलाह तैयार की जा रही है...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_generating">Mithiam te rawtna siam mek a ni...</string>
<string name="rec_ai_generating">ਮਾਹਰ ਸਲਾਹ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤੀ ਜਾ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ...</string>
<string name="alert_connecting">স্যাটেলাইটের সাথে সংযোগ স্থাপন করা হচ্ছে...</string>
<string name="alert_connecting">Satellite nen inzawm mek a ni...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">আপোনাৰ খেতিৰ বিষয়ে যিকোনো কথা সোধক...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">আপনার খামার সম্পর্কে যেকোনো কিছু জিজ্ঞাসা করুন...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">नोंथांनि पाम नि सोमोन्दै जेखि सों...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">अपने खेत के बारे में कुछ भी पूछें...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">I loneihna chungchang engpawh min zawt rawh...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">ਆਪਣੇ ਖੇਤ ਬਾਰੇ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਪੁੱਛੋ...</string>
<string name="plant_doctor_scanning">पौधे का विश्लेषण किया जा रहा है...</string>
<string name="plant_doctor_scanning">ਪੌਦੇ ਦਾ ਵਿਸ਼ਲੇਸ਼ਣ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਾ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ...</string>
<string name="kisan_sahayak_prompt">Ask me anything about your farm...</string>
<string name="plant_status_scanning">Uluk taka endik mek a ni...</string>

issue.message: Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape

Found bitmap drawable `res/drawable/mittimitra_logo.png` in densityless folder
Use version catalog instead (androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout is already available as `androidx-swiperefreshlayout`, but using version 1.2.0 instead)
Use the existing version catalog reference (`libs.androidx.work.runtime.v290`) instead
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: new SimpleDateFormat("dd MMM • hh:mm a", Locale.getDefault());

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: new SimpleDateFormat("dd MMM • hh:mm a", Locale.getDefault());

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: new SimpleDateFormat("dd MMM yyyy • hh:mm a", Locale.getDefault());

issue.message: Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
